description_long: This is a critical miscategorization error. The URL provided (https://www.city-data.com/city/Firestone-Colorado.html) is a city profile page on City-Data.com, a demographic and relocation information website. It contains no information about any financial services company named "Firestone." The page provides statistical data about Firestone, Colorado as a municipality, including population (19,396 as of 2024), median household income ($125,676), median home values ($589,073), and demographic breakdowns. The content is entirely geographic and demographic in nature, designed to help people research neighborhoods and cities for relocation purposes. There is no consumer finance company profile on this page. The categorization of this entry as a "payday-alternatives" lender appears to be either a data entry error, a confusion with a different company named Firestone, or an attempt to profile Firestone Financial (if such an entity exists separately). Without access to actual financial service company information, no legitimate company profile can be created from this source material.
